feed.title: EQUALS
feed.subtitle: EQUALS (Equitable Allocation of Low-carbon Electricity Sources in a Changing and Resource-limited World) is a 4-year research project funded by the French National Research Agency (ANR) under the Young Researcher (JCJC) programme (2025 call). The project is coordinated by Arthur Clerjon (CEA Liten, Grenoble). Official ANR page →
